task: I need to send a client update about a network issue that’s already been narrowed down, and I want to make sure it’s clear enough for someone to act on quickly. Can you help me draft a short message for that situation?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a short, action-oriented draft you can send:

**Subject:** Network Issue Update

Hi [Client Name],  
We’ve narrowed down the network issue to [brief cause/location]. The problem appears to be affecting [systems/users/sites]. We’re currently [investigating/applying a fix/coordinating with the provider], and I’ll share the next update by [time].  

Please let me know if you’re seeing any additional symptoms on your side.

Best,  
[Your Name]

If you want, I can also make it:
- more technical,
- more customer-friendly, or
- shorter and more urgent.

user_simulator.text: Pretty close. I need it tighter and less fluffy — no “please let me know” filler. Make it sound like the issue is already identified and someone needs to act, not like we’re still feeling it out. Also drop the generic subject line. Give me one clean version I can send now.

turns.agent_response:
Subject: Action Required — Network Issue Identified

Hi [Client Name],  
We’ve identified the network issue as [brief cause/location]. It is impacting [systems/users/sites]. [Team/provider] needs to [restart/replace/reroute/apply fix] to restore service. I’ll send the next update by [time].

Best,  
[Your Name]

user_simulator.text:
Closer. Still a little soft.

Make it read like a status call, not a courtesy email. Also ditch the "I’ll send the next update by [time]" unless there’s actually a deadline — if it’s already identified, the action item should be the point.

Give me one version with:
- no filler
- direct ownership of the fix
- clear impact
- one concrete action

Something like that, but tighter.

turns.agent_response:
Hi [Client Name],  

We’ve identified the issue: [brief cause/location]. It is affecting [systems/users/sites]. [Team/provider] needs to [specific action] to restore service.  

Best,  
[Your Name]

user_simulator.text: Yeah. That’s the shape of it. Tight, direct, no fluff.
